Chat Edit: 'Training Time (Typical Hardware):
  Small (6 layers, 512 dim):    ~30 minutes
  Medium (12 layers, 768 dim):  ~2 hours
  Large (24 layers, 1024 dim):  ~8 hours

  Lets fully implement reverse engineering this to get these times down as much as 90-100% utilizing our own custom methods from scratch and reverse engineering the top methods for this but for automatically adjusting to consumer/enterprise model specifications all the way to our fully supported new model streaming 800B '
